name: Brucetus Festinius
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male wearing light armor - cuirass, greaves, and boots. Wields a longsword or claymore. Sleeps in a huntsman vest and breeches.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: spellsword, mercenary, loyal, guard, professional
Role: Brucetus Festinius is a spellsword mercenary who works alongside fellow mercenaries Rigmor and S'razirr under the employ of Claude Maric. He is well-equipped with both martial skills and a respectable selection of spells, including major Alteration, Illusion, and Restoration magic, major and minor Destruction spells, and minor Conjuration spells (excluding Bound Weapons). He carries a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Usually found at the Roxey Inn, north of the Imperial City, where he stays with his fellow mercenaries and employer.
Daily Routine: At the Roxey Inn, Brucetus sleeps for eight hours from 10pm to 6am. He eats for two hours at 8am, 12pm, and 6pm. The rest of his time is spent hanging out at the inn with his companions. When his employer's quest becomes active, he and the other mercenaries travel to the Ayleid ruin of Malada, where he keeps watch over their small camp while maintaining his usual eating and sleeping schedule.
Personality - The Professional Mercenary: Brucetus is a capable spellsword who balances martial prowess with magical ability. He is professional and loyal to his employer Claude Maric, working alongside his fellow mercenaries as part of a cohesive team.
author: Bethesda
